activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

llm_result.activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

ground_truth_steps.description: Ask the patient for their surname (last name)

response_steps.description: Ask the patient for their legal surname (family name) as shown on their official ID.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe the action of requesting the patient's surname. The response step adds more specific details about requesting the 'legal' surname and referencing an 'official ID', but the core function remains the same.

ground_truth_steps.description: Confirm the spelling of the surname with the patient

response_steps.description: Verify the spelling against the ID document.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps aim to ensure the correct spelling of the surname. The ground truth specifies confirming 'with the patient', while the response specifies verifying 'against the ID document'. These are different methods to achieve the same outcome of spelling verification.

ground_truth_steps.description: Enter the surname into the registration system

response_steps.description: Type the surname into the 'Last Name' field in the HIS.
Save the surname entry in the patient record.

step_mappings.explanation: The ground truth step 'Enter the surname into the registration system' is a broader action that encompasses both typing the surname into a specific field (Response Step 2) and subsequently saving that entry (Response Step 4). The response breaks down this single action into more granular sub-steps.
